sys_script_include.name: AROPCheckSeeder_AIOPS

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_7f504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc3
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_snc_airop.AROPCheckSeeder_AIOPS</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>AROPCheckSeeder_AIOPS</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var AROPCheckSeeder_AIOPS = Class.create();
AROPCheckSeeder_AIOPS.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},
    getChecks: function() {
        return [{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"Now Assist TSOM Plugin Status","order":"10","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("sn_itom_gen_ai", "sn_itom_gen_ai");
    if (result.found) {
        return {
            status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for TSOM/ITOM (" + "sn_itom_gen_ai" + ") installed | version: " + result.version + " | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Now Assist for TSOM/ITOM is installed. AI-assisted event correlation, alert grouping, and impact analysis capabilities are available."
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: "not_ready",
            actualValue: "Now Assist for TSOM/ITOM (sn_itom_gen_ai) not found in sys_store_app or sys_plugins",
            finding: "Now Assist for TSOM/ITOM (sn_itom_gen_ai) not found. AI-assisted event correlation and alert grouping are unavailable."
        };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Now Assist for TSOM requires a dedicated plugin enabling AI-assisted event correlation and alert grouping.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Now Assist for TSOM via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm TSOM Now Assist entitlement.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"Service Operations Workspace Configuration","order":"20","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("com.snc.service_operations_workspace", "com.snc.service_operations_workspace");
    if (!result.found) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope");
        gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_sow_itom");
        gr.addQuery("active", true);
        gr.setLimit(1);
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next()) { result.found = true; result.table = "sys_scope"; }
    }
    if (result.found) {
        return { status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Service Operations Workspace is active | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "SOW active -- Now Assist TSOM AI insights visible to operations team." };
    } else {
        return { status: "needs_attention",
            actualValue: "Service Operations Workspace not found",
            finding: "Service Operations Workspace not active. Now Assist TSOM alert summaries and AI recommendations require SOW to surface to operators." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Service Operations Workspace (SOW) is where Now Assist TSOM AI features surface to operators. Without SOW, AI alerts and correlation insights are not visible.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Service Operations Workspace via sys_plugins_list.do. Configure SOW views for your operations team.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"Alert Correlation Rule Coverage","order":"30","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert_correlation_rule");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active alert correlation rules",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" correlation rules. Now Assist TSOM AI grouping requires correlation rules as the foundation.":n+" active correlation rules -- Now Assist has the foundation for AI-assisted event grouping."};})()","ai_justification":"Alert correlation rules are prerequisite for Now Assist TSOM AI-assisted event grouping. Low rule count means Now Assist has no correlation logic to enhance.","remediation_guidance":"Configure alert correlation rules via em_alert_correlation_rule_list.do for each key monitoring source.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"Runbook Automation Configuration","order":"40","check_script":"(function(){try{if(!gs.tableExists("sn_si_trigger")){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Table not found",finding:"sn_si_trigger table not present -- manual verification required. Confirm Runbook Automation is installed and active."};}var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_si_trigger");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active runbook triggers",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" active runbook triggers. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents use runbook routing rules for automated remediation -- low count limits AI action scope.":n+" active runbook triggers -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agents can execute automated remediation.";};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};};})()","ai_justification":"Runbook automation enables Now Assist TSOM AI Agents to execute automated remediation. Without runbooks, AI Agent TSOM actions are limited to alerts and routing.","remediation_guidance":"Configure runbooks for key alert types via sa_runbook_list.do. Automate top repetitive remediation tasks. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents leverage runbooks for automated remediation.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"Event Management Alert Volume","order":"50","check_script":"(function(){var d=new GlideDateTime();d.addDaysUTC(-30);var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addQuery("sys_created_on",">=",d.getValue());gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.addQuery("state","Closed");gr2.query();var closed=gr2.getRowCount();var tot=new GlideRecord("em_alert");tot.query();var total=tot.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((closed/total)*100):0;return{status:(n<10000&&pct>=50)?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" alerts last 30 days | "+pct+"% closed",finding:"Alert volume: "+n+" in 30 days with "+pct+"% closure rate. "+(n>=10000||pct<50?"High noise environment degrades Now Assist TSOM event correlation accuracy.":"Alert noise ratio acceptable for Now Assist TSOM AI correlation.")};})()","ai_justification":"Alert volume and noise ratio affect Now Assist TSOM AI correlation quality. High noise degrades AI grouping accuracy.","remediation_guidance":"Tune alert thresholds to reduce false positives. Enable auto-close for self-resolving alerts. Review em_alert_rule_list.do.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"Business Service Mapping","order":"60","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addQuery("has_map",true);gr.query();var mapped=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("cmdb_ci_service");gr2.addQuery("active",true);gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:mapped>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:mapped+" services with maps of "+total+" total",finding:mapped<5?"Only "+mapped+" services have service maps. Now Assist TSOM uses maps for AI impact analysis -- incomplete maps limit assessment depth.":mapped+" services with maps -- Now Assist TSOM has service context for AI impact analysis."};})()","ai_justification":"Business service maps provide the service context Now Assist TSOM uses for impact analysis. Without maps, AI cannot determine affected services.","remediation_guidance":"Enable Service Mapping for key business services. Target your top 10 most critical applications.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"Topology Map Configuration","order":"70","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sa_pattern");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=50?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active service mapping patterns",finding:n<50?"Only "+n+" active mapping patterns. Now Assist TSOM topology-based impact analysis requires comprehensive pattern coverage.":n+" active patterns -- Now Assist TSOM has topology foundation for AI impact traversal."};})()","ai_justification":"Topology maps provide infrastructure relationship context Now Assist uses for AI-driven impact traversal.","remediation_guidance":"Configure topology maps for key infrastructure layers. Now Assist TSOM uses topology for AI impact scope assessment.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"Alert-to-Incident Conversion Rate","order":"80","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addNotNullQuery("incident");gr.query();var linked=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((linked/total)*100):0;return{status:pct>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:pct+"% of alerts generated incidents ("+linked+"/"+total+")",finding:pct<10?"Only "+pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion. Now Assist TSOM has no historical alert-incident linkage for AI remediation learning.":pct+"% alert-to-incident conversion -- Now Assist TSOM has historical data for AI pattern learning."};})()","ai_justification":"Alert-to-incident conversion provides Now Assist TSOM with historical linkage to learn remediation patterns.","remediation_guidance":"Configure alert management rules to automatically create incidents for actionable alerts.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"MID Server Health for TSOM","order":"90","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");gr.addQuery("status","Up");gr.query();var up=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("ecc_agent");gr2.query();var total=gr2.getRowCount();return{status:up>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:total+" MID Servers | "+up+" Up",finding:up<1?"No MID Servers Up. Now Assist TSOM AI Agent-triggered probes and remediation actions require available MID Servers.":up+" MID Servers Up -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agent actions can execute."};})()","ai_justification":"MID Servers execute TSOM AI Agent-triggered discovery probes and remediation actions. Without healthy MID Servers AI actions fail silently.","remediation_guidance":"Ensure MID Servers are Up and validated for each network zone. Upgrade to current instance version.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"TSOM Agent Workspace Configuration","order":"100","check_script":"(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var checkPlugin = (function checkPlugin(storeScope, pluginSource) {    var result = { found: false, version: "", table: "" };    try {        var saGR = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app");        saGR.addQuery("scope", storeScope);        saGR.setLimit(1);        saGR.query();        if (saGR.next()) {            result.found = true;            result.version = saGR.getValue("version") || "";            result.table = "sys_store_app";            return result;        }    } catch(e1) {}    if (pluginSource) {        try {            var spGR = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");            spGR.addQuery("source", pluginSource);            spGR.addQuery("active", true);            spGR.setLimit(1);            spGR.query();            if (spGR.next()) {                result.found = true;                result.version = spGR.getValue("version") || "";                result.table = "sys_plugins";                return result;            }        } catch(e2) {}    }    return result;});
    var result = checkPlugin("com.glide.agent_workspace", "com.glide.agent_workspace");
    // Functional fallback: check sys_scope
    if (!result.found) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_scope");
        gr.addQuery("scope", "CONTAINS", "agent_workspace");
        gr.addQuery("active", true);
        gr.setLimit(1);
        gr.query();
        if (gr.next()) { result.found = true; result.table = "sys_scope"; }
    }
    if (result.found) {
        return { status: "ready",
            actualValue: "Agent Workspace is active | source: " + result.table,
            finding: "Agent Workspace active -- Now Assist TSOM AI insights visible to operators." };
    } else {
        return { status: "needs_attention",
            actualValue: "Agent Workspace not found",
            finding: "Agent Workspace not active. Now Assist TSOM alert summaries and AI recommendations require Agent Workspace." };
    }
})()","ai_justification":"Agent Workspace provides the UI where Now Assist TSOM alert summaries and AI recommendations surface to operators.","remediation_guidance":"Activate Agent Workspace. Configure TSOM-specific views. Now Assist TSOM AI insights require Agent Workspace.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"TSOM Customization Risk","order":"110","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_script");gr.addQuery("collection","em_alert");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.addEncodedQuery("sys_created_byNOT INglide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n<=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" custom BRs on em_alert",finding:"TSOM customization risk: "+n+" custom BRs. "+(n>10?"High customization increases conflict risk with Now Assist TSOM AI correlation.":"Risk within acceptable range.")};})()","ai_justification":"Custom business rules on alert and event tables can conflict with Now Assist TSOM AI correlation actions.","remediation_guidance":"Review custom BRs on em_alert. Test with Now Assist TSOM enabled in sub-production.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"},{"module":"AIOPS","check_name":"TSOM Maintenance Window Coverage","order":"120","check_script":"(function(){var gr=new GlideRecord("cmn_schedule_maintenance");gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=5?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" maintenance schedules defined",finding:n<5?"Only "+n+" maintenance schedules. Unscheduled maintenance generates false-positive alerts that degrade Now Assist TSOM AI correlation accuracy.":n+" maintenance schedules -- false-positive alert pollution is controlled."};})()","ai_justification":"Maintenance windows prevent false-positive alerts from polluting the Now Assist TSOM event correlation corpus.","remediation_guidance":"Configure maintenance schedules for planned downtime. Associate with relevant CIs.","is_manual":"0","is_clone_sensitive":"0"}];
    },
    type: 'AROPCheckSeeder_AIOPS'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-08 20:16:27</sys_created_on><sys_id>7f504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc3</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>AROPCheckSeeder_AIOPS</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_7f504ea2cf594f148935fb251d851cc3</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-08 20:46:24</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
